footer.notice: Büyük Başkan is a football club management game with device-local career data.

home.title: Run the club through data, budget pressure, and supporters.
home.lead: Büyük Başkan focuses on the club decision desk, not touchline button play. Squad planning, finance, stadium work, news, and board trust move through one career loop.

cards.title: Weekly club control
cards.summary: League targets, board trust, news decisions, and match results progress in one save.

cards.title: Keep the cash room alive
cards.summary: Wage load, sponsor income, stadium investment, and debt risk are read together.

cards.title: Grow income through facilities
cards.summary: Stands, pitch, VIP spaces, and commercial units affect long-term club value.

sections.heading: What does the player do?
paragraphs: The player acts as club chairman, managing targets, budget, staff, and sporting decisions. The game focuses on the long-term effect of decisions across a season.
Career saves and preferences stay on the device in the current build; there is no online account system or automatic career-data upload to a developer server.
list: Squad and transfer decisions
Finance and sponsor tracking
Stadium and facility investment
News-driven decision outcomes
Match viewing and result review

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lead: This policy explains how the current release build of Büyük Başkan handles data.

sections.heading: Short summary
paragraphs: Büyük Başkan does not create user accounts, does not send personal data to a developer server, and does not store career saves outside the device in the current build.
Game saves, preferences, and chairman profile choices are stored in local device storage. Removing the app or clearing app data may remove those local records.
list: No account system.
No automatic personal-data transfer to the developer.
Career data stays on the device.
The current Android manifest surface includes the INTERNET permission.

sections.heading: Data stored on the device
paragraphs: The app may store game progress, team preferences, audio and presentation settings, career saves, and similar game state in device-local storage such as IndexedDB and localStorage.
This data is used to run the game. The developer does not automatically receive it.
list: Career progress and club state
Save slots
Language, audio, and display preferences
Chairman name, club name, stadium name, and in-game choices

sections.heading: Ads, purchases, and future SDKs
paragraphs: No active AdMob or Google Play Billing SDK integration is visible in the current build, so this policy describes the current data flow.
If ads, rewarded ads, in-app purchases, or analytics SDKs are added, this policy, the terms, and the Play Console Data Safety declaration must be updated before release.
list: Rewarded ads must disclose the ad provider's data use.
Billing purchases are processed through Google Play.
Full version, Super Stadium, or in-game cash pack purchases must not ship before store declarations are refreshed.
Social follow offers must clearly show the optional external-platform handoff before the user leaves the app.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: Use the developer support email published on the store listing for privacy questions.
This is a release-ready draft; final legal approval belongs to the developer or product owner.
list: Privacy URL: https://huntertrgy.github.io/buyukbaskan/en/privacy/
Terms URL: https://huntertrgy.github.io/buyukbaskan/en/terms/

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.lead: These terms describe the basic rules for using Büyük Başkan.

sections.heading: App use
paragraphs: Büyük Başkan is an entertainment football club management game. In-game money, club value, wage data, and transfer data do not represent real financial value.
The user agrees to use the app according to applicable store rules and local law.
list: In-game decisions are simulation content.
Local save backup depends on device and platform settings.
Regular device backup is recommended against data-loss risk.

sections.heading: Purchases and ads
paragraphs: No active purchase or ads SDK is visible in the current build, so this section is kept as a draft for future store releases.
If a full-version upgrade, Super Stadium, or rewarded ad support is added, purchase, refund, and advertising declarations must be updated according to store rules.
list: Google Play purchase and refund flows run through Google's payment system.
Rewarded ad viewing must be optional.
In-game cash packs only affect the simulation balance; they do not represent real money or real financial value.
Social follow rewards should be optional, limited, and small enough not to distort the economy.
The full-version ad-removal scope must be stated in release notes.

sections.heading: Limitation of liability
paragraphs: The app is provided as is. The developer is not responsible for losses caused by device failure, operating-system changes, user-deleted data, or changes outside the store build.
These terms should be reviewed by the developer before store release.
list: This legal text is a draft.
Final responsibility belongs to the developer or product owner.
Current policy links must be published on the store listing.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.lead: New career setup, chairman identity, club choice, and first-week decisions.

sections.heading: First setup
paragraphs: A new career defines the club, chairman name, stadium name, language, and presentation preferences. These choices become the base of the career save.
Checking squad, budget, and target information in the first week makes later decisions safer.
list: Review club and rivals.
Check squad age, wage load, and quality spread.
Read weekly obligations in finance.

pages.title: Career
pages.lead: The career loop is built around week advance, news, matches, and board evaluation.

sections.heading: Weekly flow
paragraphs: Each week can change match results, finance movement, news, and club decisions.
Board trust and supporter expectations react to budget and squad decisions, not only results.
list: Read important news before decisions.
Check squad and form before matches.
Keep the season target ahead of short-term panic.

pages.title: Finance
pages.lead: The finance screen tracks cash, income sources, wage load, and support options.

sections.heading: Cash balance
paragraphs: Wages, transfer spend, and stadium investment directly affect the club's cash position.
If rewarded-ad support is added later, small cash help should be framed in the game world; the current build does not actively use that SDK.
list: Check wage budget before transfers.
Balance large facility work against match income.
Use recurring income growth to escape negative cash.

sections.heading: Get Investment
paragraphs: A future Get Investment section can be added to Finance. It can present small cash support through social follow tasks, rewarded ads, or in-game cash packs sold through Google Play Billing.
This flow is not active in the current build. Before release, economy balance, purchase restoration behavior, the privacy policy, terms, and the Play Console Data Safety declaration must be updated.
list: Social follow: optional external link plus a small one-time in-game reward.
In-game cash purchase: Google Play Billing product plus restore/entitlement checks.
Rewarded ad: ad SDK declaration plus a small cash support scaled to the club treasury.
In-game copy can frame offers as municipal support, government aid, supporter donations, or sponsor investment.

pages.title: Transfers
pages.lead: Transfer decisions should consider squad quality, wage budget, and team balance together.

sections.heading: Buying and selling
paragraphs: The transfer market is not only about chasing higher ratings. Age, wage, position need, and club budget matter together.
Selling can create short-term cash, but a thin squad can weaken match performance and supporter trust.
list: Identify missing positions first.
Flag older high-wage players as risk.
Check wage budget before offers.

pages.title: Stadium and Facilities
pages.lead: Stadium and facility investments affect income, club value, and long-term growth.

sections.heading: Investment choice
paragraphs: Stand, VIP, pitch, and commercial upgrades cost cash now; timed well, they strengthen club value later.
If Super Stadium later becomes an in-app purchase or in-game money unlock, purchased users should be able to claim it across new careers.
list: Do not make major upgrades with unsafe cash.
Tie high-income upgrades to the season plan.
Track Super Stadium ownership as a product entitlement independent from career saves.

pages.title: Match Flow
pages.lead: The match screen moves through preparation, live events, and result review.

sections.heading: Matchday
paragraphs: The pre-match screen helps review opponent and team status quickly. The live flow tracks score, events, and stats.
The result screen feeds not only the scoreline but also performance signals for next week's decisions.
list: Check unavailable or tired players before the match.
Watch event tempo and card risk in live flow.
Recheck finance and news after the result.

pages.title: FAQ
pages.lead: Short answers about saves, data, ads, purchases, and store release.

sections.heading: Data and purchases
paragraphs: There is no account system in the current build; saves are stored on the device.
If ads and in-app purchase SDKs are added, the privacy policy, terms, and Data Safety declaration must be updated before release closure.
list: Saves can be lost if device app data is removed.
A future full version may remove ads except rewarded ads.
Super Stadium ownership should be claimable across careers.

store.title: Store metadata and Data Safety draft
store.lead: This page collects EN store text, image requirements, and current-build data declarations.

cards.title: Büyük Başkan
paragraphs: Suggested category: Games > Sports or Simulation.
Support URL: https://huntertrgy.github.io/buyukbaskan/en/
list: Short description: Run a football club through budget, transfers, stadium work, and supporter pressure.

Full description: Büyük Başkan is a season-based football management game centered on the club office. Plan the squad, protect the transfer budget, time stadium investments, and track how news decisions affect club trust.

cards.title: Current build declaration
paragraphs: No user data collected by developer in current build.
Career data is stored on the device through IndexedDB and localStorage; there is no automatic transfer to a developer server.
list: No account.
No personal data collection.
No active ads or purchase SDK.
Android manifest permission surface: INTERNET.

cards.title: Finance > Get Investment
paragraphs: A future Finance section can group social follow rewards, rewarded ads, Google Play Billing in-game cash packs, and full-version/Super Stadium offers in one controlled surface.
This plan is not a current-build declaration; if Billing or ads SDKs are added, privacy, terms, Data Safety, and store metadata must be updated before release closure.
list: Digital in-game cash packs must be sold through Google Play Billing.
Social follow tasks should remain optional external links.
Rewarded ads must disclose the ad provider's data use.
Cash support must be balanced with daily or weekly caps, treasury-health checks, and small one-time rewards.
Billing restore, refund/revocation, duplicate grants, and cross-career Super Stadium claim behavior must be tested.
If the full version removes ads except rewarded ads, the scope must be explicit in store text.

cards.title: Play Console asset list
paragraphs: Prepare a 512x512 PNG app icon, 1024x500 feature graphic, and 6 Android phone screenshots.
Screenshot target is 1080x1920 9:16, 24-bit PNG, without alpha.
list: Summary
News
Squad
Transfer
Stadium or Finance
Match result

sections.heading: Required update before release
